perksWithImages.name: Hex: Crowd Control
perksWithImages.description:
The first time a Survivor medium or fast-vaults a Window, a Dull Totem ignites.

The last {Tunable.K23P02.MaximumVaultsBlocked} Windows Survivors medium or fast-vault are blocked.

You basic-vault blocked Windows {Tunable.K23P02.VaultSpeedIncrease%}% faster.

You see the Auras of blocked Windows within {Tunable.K23P02.AuraRevealDistance}m.

perksWithImages.name: Left Behind
perksWithImages.description: When all other Survivors are dead, while within {Tunable.S08P01.HatchRevealDistance}m of the Hatch, you see its Aura.

perksWithImages.name: Mettle of Man
perksWithImages.description:
After taking {Tunable.S17P03.TokensNeeded} protection hits, while injured and until you go down, the next time you would be downed by the Killer, take no damage instead.

When you become healthy, while you are at least {Tunable.S17P03.AuraRevealDistance}m from the Killer, they see your Aura.

When the trial starts, you are more likely to be the Obsession.

perksWithImages.name: Zanshin Tactics
perksWithImages.description:
Within {Tunable.K18P01.VaultablesRevealDistance}m, you see the Auras of Pallets and windows.

Whenever a Survivor drops a Pallet, you see their Aura for {Tunable.K18P01.AuraRevealDuration}s.
